title: Build Cart drawer or page with item list, quantity controls, and totals
acceptance_criteria: Cart drawer or /cart page lists all cart items with image placeholder, name, unit price, and quantity.
Quantity can be increased, decreased, and removed; item is removed when quantity reaches zero.
Subtotal, shipping placeholder, and total are displayed and recalculated correctly.
Checkout button is present as a placeholder (no backend integration).
Drawer closes via close button, overlay click, and Escape key; focus returns to trigger.
Empty cart state is shown when no items are present.
